name: Lemon Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and cook shallots until softened.
2. Add rice and coat with butter.
3. Add wine, stir and cook till nearly absorbed.
4. Gradually add 1 cup chicken stock, stirring until nearly absorbed.
5. Continue adding the remaining stock, about half at a time, until all is used.
6. If using, add the optional frozen peas.
7. Remove from heat and stir in herbs, lemon juice, and zest.
8. Stir in cheese and let sit for 2-3 minutes before serving.
